Task Master [...] What do you think? …

Task Master

Must have platform for this time where we can find remote jobs at a single place. Do you have international jobs too or is it just India based?

Sakshi Gupta

@task\_master It has opportunities across the world. :)

Katsuhiro Sasaki

Congrats on the launch 🎉

It’s awesome to see more opportunities for people to work from anywhere in the world.

Sakshi Gupta

@katssasa Thanks very much for your support. We would love you to give it a try. :)

Shishimanu Uzumaki

This is such a timely product; verified remote jobs are something so many professionals are actively seeking. Love that you’re making posting free for employers, too. Best of luck with your September 23rd launch

Sakshi Gupta
